title: Duracell LR44 1.5 V Electronics Alkaline Battery (1x Pack of 2)
features: SUITABLE FOR A WIDE RANGE OF DEVICES: Duracell LR44 specialty alkaline batteries 1.5V (A76) are ideal for your digital thermometer, calculator, flashlight, wrist watches, security system panel, medical devices and more.
LEAKAGE PREVENTION: superior nylon top closure helps prevent our specialty batteries from leakage.
RELIABLE batteries for your specialty devices
description: Product Description DURACELL LR44 specialty alkaline batteries give +50% extra life to your specialty devices. They are suitable for use in digital thermometer, calculator, flashlight, wrist watches, security system panel, medical devices and more. Box Contains Batteries
